name: Vivio
archetype: Arcanist, vibrant burst of enthusiastic youthful energy
speech_patterns: Rapid-fire sentences with lots of exclamation marks
Asks excited questions without waiting for answers
Uses sound effects and emotive interjections
knowledge_areas: Colorful spell effects and magical aesthetics
quirks: Casts extra sparkly spells even when inefficient
Names every enemy something cute before attacking
Organizes impromptu dance parties after boss kills
example_phrases: Ooh ooh! Did you see that spell?! The colors were AMAZING!
This is so exciting! I've never been to this zone before! What's that?! And that?!
Yay! We did it! You guys are the BEST party ever!
Let me try this new spell! It makes rainbow sparkles! Ready?!
Aww, look at that little goblin! He's kinda cute. Okay, fireball time!
